summary: A casual real-life social photo transformed into a playful poster by layering original cartoon mascot stickers, hand-drawn outlines, ribbon headline panels, sparkles, spirals, and sketchy decorative marks over the photographic scene.
prompt_template:
Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} image in the "Playful Mascot Doodle Snapshot" style.

Subject: {SUBJECT}.
Subject action: {SUBJECT_ACTION}.
Product or prop: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}.
Location: {LOCATION}.
Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}.
Main text: "{MAIN_TEXT}".
Secondary text: "{SECONDARY_TEXT}".
Accent symbols: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}.
Wardrobe or styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}.

Use a realistic casual phone-photo scene as the base layer. Keep the environment photographic, naturally lit, and location-specific. Add original flat cartoon mascot stickers on top of the photo: fruit, cloud, star, cup, wave, and jelly-shaped characters with simple eyes, thick dark outlines, glossy color blocks, sunny yellow, teal, coral, sky blue, lavender, cream, and soft pink accents. Add a loose warm outline around the main subject, plus hand-drawn sparkles, spirals, web lines, stars, arrows, and marker doodles floating over the scene.

Place the main headline inside a cream or pale-yellow wavy ribbon sticker in the upper third. Use imperfect uppercase hand-lettered marker typography in dark burgundy ink. Keep the main subject's face, product, or focal object unobstructed. The result should feel like a cheerful social-media photo booth collage, not a polished corporate ad.

Avoid watermark, username, platform logo, QR code, creator signature, licensed character, recognizable franchise costume, superhero emblem, brand logo, exact reference character, copied IP, goggle-eyed capsule character, denim overalls, red-blue web-pattern suit, mask, shield, helmet emblem, tiny unreadable text, dense paragraph text, corporate layout, sterile studio render, fully vector background, 3D plush mascot, photoreal CGI mascot, dark horror mood, gritty dystopian tone, cyberpunk neon scene, face obstruction, distorted hands, and over-sharpened artificial texture.
negative_prompt: Avoid watermark, username, platform logo, QR code, creator signature, licensed character, recognizable franchise costume, superhero emblem, brand logo, exact reference character, copied IP, goggle-eyed capsule character, denim overalls, red-blue web-pattern suit, mask, shield, helmet emblem, tiny unreadable text, dense paragraph text, corporate layout, sterile studio render, fully vector background, 3D plush mascot, photoreal CGI mascot, dark horror mood, gritty dystopian tone, cyberpunk neon scene, face obstruction, distorted hands, and over-sharpened artificial texture.

variables.SUBJECT: main person, group, product, pet, or focal object
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: main pose or action, such as leaning, posing, holding a prop, waving, sitting, listening, or celebrating
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: object, product, food, drink, book, toy, travel item, or hero prop placed in the scene
variables.LOCATION: real-world environment or setting, such as garden cafe, bookstore, street market, boardwalk, classroom, studio, or transit stop
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: secondary scene details such as plants, furniture, lights, windows, shelves, railings, signage, or crowd hints
variables.MAIN_TEXT: short hand-lettered headline inside a ribbon or sticker panel
variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: optional small handwritten label, tiny caption, or repeated supporting mark; can be empty
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: decorative symbol set such as stars, spirals, web lines, hearts, arrows, sparkle marks, or comic motion lines
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: styling direction for the subject or mascot costumes, such as casual cafe outfit, travel outfit, streetwear, beachwear, school outfit, or colorful themed accessories

usage_note: Copy this JSON into an LLM image workflow and replace only the variables to keep the visual style consistent.

variables.SUBJECT: a young traveler at a leafy outdoor cafe
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: resting their cheek on one hand while smiling toward the camera
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a wooden cafe table with an iced drink and a small travel notebook
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: lush palm leaves, black metal railing, glass roof, string lights, warm wooden tables
variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: tiny hello labels near the stickers
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: white corner web lines, pale yellow sparkles, pink spirals, curly marker swashes
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: casual summer cafe outfit with soft warm colors

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a 16:9 image in the Playful Mascot Doodle Snapshot style. Subject: a young traveler at a leafy outdoor cafe. Subject action: resting their cheek on one hand while smiling toward the camera. Product or prop: a wooden cafe table with an iced drink and a small travel notebook. Location: a bright garden cafe terrace. Background elements: lush palm leaves, black metal railing, glass roof, string lights, warm wooden tables. Main text: "MASCOT MEETUP". Secondary text: tiny hello labels near the stickers. Accent symbols: white corner web lines, pale yellow sparkles, pink spirals, curly marker swashes. Wardrobe or styling: casual summer cafe outfit with soft warm colors. Use a realistic casual phone-photo scene as the base layer, with original fruit, cloud, star, cup, wave, and jelly-shaped flat cartoon mascot stickers layered over it. Add a cream wavy ribbon headline across the upper left with imperfect dark burgundy hand lettering. Keep the subject's face unobstructed. Spread mascot stickers across the foreground and side edges while keeping the cafe visible. Avoid watermark, usernames, logos, licensed characters, copied IP, franchise costumes, goggle-eyed capsule characters, denim overalls, red-blue web-pattern suits, masks, shields, and helmet emblems.
example_cases.prompt_9x16: Create a 9:16 image in the Playful Mascot Doodle Snapshot style. Subject: a young traveler at a leafy outdoor cafe. Subject action: resting their cheek on one hand while smiling toward the camera. Product or prop: a wooden cafe table with an iced drink and a small travel notebook. Location: a bright garden cafe terrace. Background elements: lush palm leaves, black metal railing, glass roof, string lights, warm wooden tables. Main text: "MASCOT MEETUP". Secondary text: tiny hello labels near the stickers. Accent symbols: white corner web lines, pale yellow sparkles, pink spirals, curly marker swashes. Wardrobe or styling: casual summer cafe outfit with soft warm colors. Use a realistic casual phone-photo scene as the base layer, with original fruit, cloud, star, cup, wave, and jelly-shaped flat cartoon mascot stickers layered over it. Add a cream wavy ribbon headline in the upper third with imperfect dark burgundy hand lettering. Keep the subject's face unobstructed. Use vertical stacking, one edge-cropped foreground mascot, and one small sticker peeking from behind the subject. Avoid watermark, usernames, logos, licensed characters, copied IP, franchise costumes, goggle-eyed capsule characters, denim overalls, red-blue web-pattern suits, masks, shields, and helmet emblems.
